title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Verify account deletion flow in App Settings: confirmation dialog appears, cancel keeps user logged in and on Cloud, confirm logs user out and removes from Cloud tenant.
steps: 5. Test cancel: Click cancel on the dialog.
6. Verify that the dialog closes, the user stays logged in, and the user remains on the Cloud tenant.
7. Test confirm: Click confirm on the dialog.
8. Verify that the dialog closes, a spinner appears, an 'Account Deleted' popup appears briefly, the user is logged out, and the user is removed from the Cloud tenant.
expected:
- Cancel: Dialog closes, user stays logged in, user remains on Cloud tenant.
- Confirm: Dialog closes, spinner appears, "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly, user is logged out and removed from Cloud tenant.
